Signal Tracker
⟳ Refresh Dashboard
Choose what to refresh, then run the command in your terminal
🌱 Re-seed Signals
Re-inserts all manually-researched signals from KNOWN_SIGNALS into the database.
Safe to re-run — duplicates are automatically skipped.
python seed_csg_signals.py
📰 Fetch Google News
Fetches the latest Google News for all 292 CSG companies (last 90 days).
Takes ~6 minutes. Re-running is safe — duplicates are skipped.
python fetch_csg_news.py
⚙️ Rebuild Dashboard
Regenerates the dashboard HTML from the database.
Run this after re-seeding or fetching news.
python build_csg_dashboard.py
🚀 Publish to Live Site
After rebuilding the dashboard, push to Railway to go live.
Run this from C:\Users\krishna.l\company-signal-tracker\
git add -A ; git commit -m "Update CSG dashboard" ; git push
